summary: Completed comprehensive testing of ELS MHD Step 04 - Patientendetail + S4->S0 Migration. All 18 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI tests passed for all core functionality including S4->S0 migration, PatientDetail page, Transport/Fallabschluss dialogs, Timeline, KPI tiles, and Smart Enhancement (Ein-Klick-Status-Progression).
seed_data_creation: Created test patients P-0006 through P-0009 during testing, cleaned up after tests. Test incident TEST_Step04_Incident was created and cleaned up by pytest.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Step 04 fully tested. Backend: S4->S0 migration verified (S4 returns 422, S0 works), transport_typ and fallabschluss_typ PATCH endpoints work with automatic status progression. Frontend: S4->S0 migration complete (KPI kpi-s0, QuickEntryBar quick-sichtung-S0, Filter filter-sichtung-S0 all present, S4 variants removed). PatientDetail page (/patienten/:patientId) works with deep links. All data-testid attributes properly implemented: pd-kennung, pd-status, pd-back, pd-delete, pd-notiz, pd-verbleib, pd-next-step, pd-done, kpi-seit-sichtung, kpi-behandlung, kpi-transport, patient-timeline, timeline-created_at, timeline-sichtung_at, timeline-behandlung_start_at, timeline-transport_angefordert_at, timeline-fallabschluss_at, transport-dialog, transport-dialog-opt-intern, transport-dialog-opt-extern, fallabschluss-dialog, fallabschluss-dialog-opt-rd_uebergabe, fallabschluss-dialog-opt-entlassung, fallabschluss-dialog-opt-manuell.

backend: GET /api/meta returns version 0.4.0 and step '04 – Patientendetail'
POST with sichtung='S4' returns 422 (no longer allowed after migration)
POST with sichtung='S0' succeeds and creates patient
No S4 patients exist in database after migration
PATCH with transport_typ='intern' sets status=transportbereit AND transport_angefordert_at
PATCH with transport_typ='extern' sets status=transportbereit AND transport_angefordert_at
PATCH with fallabschluss_typ='rd_uebergabe' sets status=uebergeben, verbleib=rd, fallabschluss_at
PATCH with fallabschluss_typ='entlassung' sets status=entlassen, verbleib=event, fallabschluss_at
PATCH with fallabschluss_typ='manuell' sets status=entlassen, fallabschluss_at (verbleib unchanged)
Fallabschluss preserves existing verbleib if not 'unbekannt'
Full progression flow: in_behandlung -> transportbereit -> uebergeben
PATCH with sichtung sets timestamps but not status (by design)
All valid sichtung levels (S0, S1, S2, S3) work correctly
frontend: Click on patient row navigates to /patienten/{id}
PatientDetail shows Kennung (pd-kennung), Sichtung, Status, DEMO badge
Smart Enhancement: pd-next-step adapts to status
After completion: pd-done shown instead of pd-next-step
